messages.content: You are a helpful AI assistant equipped with the tool-calling CLI. Use the CLI to fulfill the user's request.
Please execute the tool "PPT Master". Description: AI 將文件或主題轉為原生 PowerPoint 簡報，支援形狀、轉場動畫、數據圖表、表格、音頻旁白及自定義 .pptx 模板. Arguments: hello world

<thought>I will invoke the tool "ppt-master" via the CLI to fulfill this request.</thought>
```bash
node cli.js invoke ppt-master hello world
```
